title: Great visit!  View, history and cocktails watching the sunset! - Review of Smith Tower Visitor Experience, Seattle, WA - Tripadvisor
content: Sign in to get trip updates and message other travelers. **#10** of 192 Sights & Landmarks in Seattle. *   Image 5 2 ### Seattle's Original Guided Harbor Cruise 4.7 (856) from $46. Lovely older building with a lot of history, Great views from the observatory and we loved the fact it had a bar/lounge where you could have drinks and appetizers while watching the sunset over the sound. *   Image 6 3 ### Seattle Gold Rush Quest: Race to the S.S. Portland 4.4 (17) from $9. *   Image 7 4 ### Seattle Downtown Highlights Private Guided Walking Tour (0) from $179. *   Image 9 6 ### Beneath The Streets Underground History Tour 4.7 (5,788) from $32. *   Image 10 7 ### Seattle Seafood Tour: A Long Lunch of Market-Fresh Tastings 4.8 (17) from $119. It has a little museum-style display that you walk through to get to the top of the tower, which is cute. The view is incredible and the bar/restaurant is great!

title: S Holgate St Crossing Study - Transportation | seattle.gov
content: # S Holgate St Crossing Study. Ang nilalamang ito ay propesyonal na isinalin sa ibang mga wika. ### Descripción General del Estudio del Cruce de S Holgate St. En este momento, estamos recopilando opiniones para guiar el estudio. S Holgate St es una calle muy transitada en el área de SODO (al sur del centro) en Seattle. Cada día, el cruce ferroviario aquí es usado por trenes de carga, trenes suburbanos y Amtrak, lo que lo convierte en uno de los cruces ferroviarios más peligrosos en el estado de Washington. Por este motivo, BNSF y Amtrak están solicitando a la Ciudad de Seattle que considere cerrar permanentemente la calle S Holgate St entre Occidental Ave S y 3rd Ave S. * Cerrar S Holgate St en el cruce ferroviario y redirigir el tráfico a otras calles. Dahil dito, hinihiling ng BNSF at Amtrak sa Lungsod ng Seattle na isaalang-alang ang permanenteng pagsasara ng S Holgate St sa pagitan ng Occidental Ave S at 3rd Ave S.

title: Beneath the Streets Photos - Yelp
content: 4.7 (1.3k reviews) The tour was fantastic and very informative. The in-sidewalk installations of prisms from above and below viewpoints was fascinating.

title: Seattle in One Day… Is It Worth It?

*Start fresh any day of the year with our sponsor BetterHelp. Click https://betterhelp.com/mattandnat for a discount on your first month of therapy.* (Sponsored by BetterHelp)

*How to Spend One Day in Seattle, Washington | Top Things to Do, See, & Eat in the “Emerald City”!*

Welcome to Seattle! If you’ve been following our channel for a while, then you might remember that Seattle was actually _one of_ the first travel videos we ever posted on our channel more than 4 years ago! Since then, we’ve been back to the PNW a handful of times and have fallen a little more in love with it each time. This is our first time back to Seattle since that visit more than 4 years ago and we couldn’t be more excited! Unfortunately, this time around we got a taste of the true Seattle weather… grey and rainy! But we’re excited to take you along and show you some of the best things to do, see, and eat in the Emerald City… rain or shine!

title: Visitor Resources - Visit Seattle
content: ## Seattle trip planning and on-the-ground information. People gather near a market information booth in an outdoor shopping area. A large clock with red neon letters is visible. The setting includes a mix of buildings and parked cars, with flower baskets hanging from the eaves. #### Seattle Visitor Centers. An open magazine spread features Seattle highlights, including local food items, a woman standing by a wooden totem, a pizza, and a chef helping a child in a kitchen. #### Seattle's Official Visitors' Guide. #### Request a FREE Visitor Information Packet. A cyclist wearing a helmet and backpack rides a bike on a bright green bike lane in an urban setting. The road has markings for bikes, and there's a parking sign and buildings in the background. The sky is clear and blue, and the ocean can be seen in the background. A large cruise ship docked at a port in a city skyline featuring the Space Needle, under a blue sky.
